policies.mainTitle: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
policies.intro: Welcome to Versia Garden! Thank you for using our app to cultivate your garden. By using our services, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
policies.termsText1: By creating an account and using the Versia Garden app, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.
policies.termsText2: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account and use Versia Garden services.
policies.termsText3: Versia Garden provides a space for the community to share experiences. To maintain a positive and focused environment, you agree to:
policies.communityRule1: Post only content (texts, photos, questions) strictly related to gardening, plants, and cultivation.
policies.communityRule2: Not post offensive material, spam, unauthorized advertising, or any content that violates the law or third-party rights.
policies.communityRule3: The Versia Garden team reserves the right to moderate, edit, or remove any content that does not comply with these rules, at our sole discretion.
policies.termsText4: The app and all its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Versia Garden LLC and its licensors.
policies.privacyIntro: Your privacy is very important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how you can manage it.
policies.privacyText1: To provide our services, we collect the following personal information when you create your account:
policies.privacyText2: We use the collected data for the following purposes:
policies.dataUse1: Personalize your experience: Adapt the app's content and features for you.
policies.dataUse2: Process your orders: Manage the purchase and delivery of products.
policies.dataUse3: Communication: Send important notifications about your orders, growing tips, and account information.
policies.dataUse4: Marketing: Send emails with promotions and news about Versia Garden, which you can opt out of at any time.
policies.privacyText3: Versia Garden LLC does not sell or rent your personal information. Your data is kept secure with us. However, for the app to function, we share data with the following essential service providers who are contractually obligated to protect it:
policies.sharingPartner1: Supabase: For secure database storage and account authentication.
policies.sharingPartner2: Google Maps: To provide address autocomplete and suggestion functionality.
policies.privacyText4: We will keep your personal data while your account is active. If you decide to delete your account, your data will be permanently removed from our systems within 90 days.
policies.changesText: We may update our Terms and Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new version on this page.
policies.contactText: If you have any questions about these policies, please contact us by email:
